footer.credit: Crafted with ❤️ by WJZ_P | Not an official Minecraft product

about.title: CommitCraft
about.description: Forge your GitHub public data into Minecraft-style SVG showcases.
about.whatIsThisContent: CommitCraft transforms GitHub user contributions, repository info, and statistics into previewable, downloadable, and embeddable Minecraft pixel-art SVGs. Perfect for READMEs, personal pages, portfolios, or sharing directly.
about.inputUsernameDetail: Generates Contribution Map, Banner Hall, and Player Passport views.
about.inputShortDetail: Directly generates a Repo Card, great for project overviews.
about.inputUrlDetail: Auto-parses owner/repo, handy for pasting GitHub page URLs.
about.resultMapDetail: Transforms the annual contribution heatmap into a Minecraft-style isometric terrain map.
about.resultBannerDetail: Generates achievement banners from GitHub stats with rotatable viewing angles.
about.resultPassportDetail: Creates a player passport card with customizable quote.
about.resultRepoDetail: Displays repo name, description, language, and popularity info. Supports SVG download.
about.step1: Enter a GitHub username, short repo format, or full repo URL in the input box.
about.step2_suffix: and wait for the page to generate the content.
about.step4_suffix: ; copyable endpoints are provided below for embedding in READMEs or web pages.
about.step5: Player Passport supports custom quotes; Banner Hall supports drag rotation; Repo Card supports direct export.
about.apiStatIdNote_suffix: for Banner Hall is provided as a copy button next to each banner — no need to memorize it.
about.note1: Exports are primarily SVG for easy editing, web embedding, and crisp scaling.
about.note2: Both user mode and repo mode work with public GitHub data sources.
about.note3: Repo Card download now supports mixed CJK/Latin content export without losing Chinese descriptions.

components.bannerHint: Drag slider to rotate banners • Ranks based on your GitHub stats
components.mapHint: Hover to inspect • Height & ores scale with commits
components.passportHint: Customize your quote • Download or embed your Player Passport
